name: tutorpress-lite
description: TutorPress Lite for Tutor LMS improves Tutor LMS with shared TutorPress settings, Gutenberg-friendly redirects, lesson discussion tabs, and co-instructor editing.

scripts.package: npm run make-build && cd tutorpress-lite-build && COPYFILE_DISABLE=1 zip -r ../tutorpress-lite.zip tutorpress-lite-for-tutor-lms -x '*/.DS_Store' -x '*/._*' -x '__MACOSX/*' && cd .. && rm -rf tutorpress-lite-build
